Package com.shaft.cli

package com.shaft.cli
  • Class
    Description
    FileActions
    Utility class for file-system operations such as copying, deleting, compressing, and extracting files and directories.
    SshCommandResult
    Structured result of a remote SSH command executed through TerminalActions.
    SshConnectionOptions
    Immutable SSH connection settings for reusable TerminalActions remote terminals.
    SshConnectionOptions.Builder
     
    SshConnectionOptions.KeyboardInteractive
    Supplies responses for JSch keyboard-interactive authentication prompts.
    SshShellOptions
    Immutable options for an experimental reusable SSH shell channel.
    SshShellOptions.Builder
     
    SshShellSession
    Experimental interactive SSH shell session backed by one JSch ChannelShell.
    TerminalActions
    Executes shell commands on local or remote terminals.
